famous quote:
"The Christian says, 'Creatures are not born with desires unless satisfaction for those desires exists. A baby feels hunger: well, there is such a thing as food. A duckling wants to swim: well, there is such a thing as water. Men feel sexual desire: well, there is such a thing as sex. If I find in myself a desire which no experience in this world can satisfy, the most probable explanation is that I was made for another world. If none of my earthly pleasures satisfy it, that does not prove that the universe is a fraud. Probably earthly pleasures were never meant to satisfy it, but only to arouse it, to suggest the real thing. If that is so, I must take care, on the one hand, never to despise, or to be unthankful for, these earthly blessings, and on the other, never to mistake them for the something else of which they are only a kind of copy, or echo, or mirage. I must keep alive in myself the desire for my true country, which I shall not find till after death; I must never let it get snowed under or turned aside; I must make it the main object of life to press on to that country and to help others to do the same."
-- C.S. Lewis (Mere Christianity)
Interview Text:
Hannah Noble:

(part 1)

This is a story recorded while interviewing Hannah Noble. She tells how the spiritual world, especially dreams and circumstances, has helped clue her in to be aware of things. 

She didn't start getting prophetic dreams until they were in the heat of going through very difficult stuff at their church. Spiritual and emotional abuse, and hidden bad behaviors were happening there. She would have dreams about people who were leaving their church, and then something would happen to back this up days or weeks later.

One example was that she had a dream about a month prior to our interview. In it she was at a baby shower, for herself. There was a couple that surprised her by showing up. It was part of the staff from their church. They said, yeah we have a lot to catch up on. Sometime later, a friend texted Hannah and said, "You'll never guess who I ran into." It was this couple and they had left the church.
Music Video Instructions: Ponder all that we relentlessly strive for and the fullness God has waiting for us when we simply turn to him.
